feature_catalog.label: White British
feature_catalog.description: Share of usual residents identifying as White British.

feature_catalog.label: UK-born
feature_catalog.description: Share of usual residents born in the United Kingdom.

feature_catalog.label: English Identity Only
feature_catalog.description: Share of usual residents reporting English only national identity.

feature_catalog.label: English/British Identity
feature_catalog.description: Share of usual residents reporting English only, British only, or English and British only identity.

feature_catalog.label: Christian
feature_catalog.description: Share of usual residents reporting Christian religion.

feature_catalog.label: No Religion
feature_catalog.description: Share of usual residents reporting no religion.

feature_catalog.label: Muslim
feature_catalog.description: Share of usual residents reporting Muslim religion.

feature_catalog.label: Age 50+
feature_catalog.description: Share of usual residents aged 50 and over.

feature_catalog.label: Age 65+
feature_catalog.description: Share of usual residents aged 65 and over.

feature_catalog.label: Managerial/Professional
feature_catalog.description: Share of residents aged 16+ in higher or lower managerial, administrative and professional NS-SeC groups.

feature_catalog.label: Semi-routine/Routine
feature_catalog.description: Share of residents aged 16+ in semi-routine or routine NS-SeC groups.

feature_catalog.label: Degree Level
feature_catalog.description: Share of residents aged 16+ with level 4 qualifications and above.

feature_catalog.label: No Qualifications
feature_catalog.description: Share of residents aged 16+ with no qualifications.
